scripts.preview:dev: npm run build && wrangler dev --env dev
scripts.preview:qa: npm run build && wrangler dev --env qa
scripts.preview:prod: npm run build && wrangler dev --env prod
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env dev
scripts.deploy:qa: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env qa
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env prod
